title: Labrador (Newfoundland and Labrador) - Canada.ca
content:
## Labrador Newfoundland and Labrador

## Labrador Newfoundland and Labrador
Labrador, including Labrador City-Wabush and Happy Valley-Goose Bay is a great place to live, thanks to its hospitality and friendly atmosphere. The presence of French-language school services and opportunities for jobs in key sectors—such as mining, government, health and tourism—promote integration within the region.
